articles.title: Ancient DNA reveals the mysterious collapse of Europe's megalith builders
articles.summary: DNA from a 5,000-year-old French megalithic tomb reveals that the people buried before and after a population collapse were genetically unrelated, pointing to a major migration after a devastating crisis.
